en.category_description: Requests and issue resolution related to HR systems, employee records, and payroll.

es.category_name: Sistemas de RR. HH. y Nómina
es.category_description: Solicitudes y resolución de problemas relacionados con sistemas de recursos humanos, registros de empleados y nómina.

fr.category_description: Demandes et résolution de problèmes liés aux systèmes RH, aux dossiers des employés et à la paie.

ko.category_description: 인사 정보 혹은 급여 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.

en.category_description: Report issues related to work logs or attendance records.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the affected date(s) and details of the attendance issue.

es.category_description: Informe problemas relacionados con registros de trabajo o asistencia.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya la(s) fecha(s) afectada(s) y los detalles del problema.

fr.category_description: Signaler des problèmes liés aux journaux de travail ou aux enregistrements de présence.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure la ou les dates concernées et les détails du problème.

ko.category_description: 근무 일지나 출근 기록에 이상이 있는 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 날짜와 이상 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Report issues related to processed or paid payroll.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the pay period and details of the payroll issue.

es.category_description: Informe problemas relacionados con nóminas ya procesadas o pagadas.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya el período de pago y los detalles del problema.

fr.category_description: Signaler des problèmes liés à une paie déjà traitée ou versée.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure la période de paie et les détails du problème.

ko.category_description: 이미 지급된 급여가 이상이 있는 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 날짜와 급여 이상 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Report issues related to leave or vacation management systems.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the affected date(s) and leave or vacation details.

es.category_name: Problema del sistema de permisos / vacaciones
es.category_description: Informe problemas relacionados con el sistema de gestión de permisos o vacaciones.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya la(s) fecha(s) afectada(s) y los detalles del permiso o vacaciones.

fr.category_description: Signaler des problèmes liés au système de gestion des congés.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure la ou les dates concernées et les détails du congé.

ko.category_description: 휴가와 연차에 관련된 문제에 대해 해결을 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 문제가 발생한 날짜와 휴가 혹은 연차 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.

en.category_description: Request corrections to employee profile information.
en.category_placeholder: Please include the employee details and the information to be corrected.

es.category_description: Solicite correcciones en la información del perfil del empleado.
es.category_placeholder: Incluya los datos del empleado y la información a corregir.

fr.category_description: Demande de correction des informations du profil de l’employé.
fr.category_placeholder: Veuillez inclure les informations de l’employé et les éléments à corriger.

ko.category_description: 직원 프로필을 올바르게 수정할 수 있게 요청합니다.
ko.category_placeholder: 수정이 필요한 직원 정보를 포함하여 요청해주세요.
